name: Mushak massa oshirish
plan: 💪 Mushak massa oshirish rejasi 📅 1-Kun: Ko'krak va Triceps • Bench press / Push-ups - 4x8-10 • Incline dumbbell press - 3x10 • Chest flyes - 3x12 • Tricep dips - 3x10 • Tricep extensions - 3x12 📅 2-Kun: Orqa va Biceps • Pull-ups / Rows - 4x8 • Lat pulldowns - 3x10 • Dumbbell rows - 3x10 (har qo'l) • Bicep curls - 3x12 • Hammer curls - 3x12 📅 3-Kun: Dam olish 📅 4-Kun: Oyoqlar • Squats (og'irlik bilan) - 4x8 • Lunges - 3x10 (har oyoq) • Leg press - 3x12 • Calf raises - 4x15 • Hamstring curls - 3x12 📅 5-Kun: Yelka va Qorin • Shoulder press - 4x10 • Lateral raises - 3x12 • Front raises - 3x12 • Shrugs - 3x15 • Weighted crunches - 3x15 • Planka - 3x60 soniya 📅 6-7 Kun: Dam olish 💡 Maslahatlar: - Mushak o'sishi uchun protein ko'p iste'mol qiling - Og'irliklarni progressiv oshiring - Har bir mashqdan keyin cho'ziling - 8 soat uxlang - mushaklar dam olishda o'sadi! - Premium bilan individual reja - sizning maqsadingizga moslashtirilgan 💎
